test-015.scenario: validateJWT returns valid with userId for valid token
given: A valid access token for user 'user-789'
then: Returns Promise resolving to {valid: true, userId: 'user-789'}

test-016.scenario: validateJWT returns error for expired token
then: Returns Promise resolving to {valid: false, error: 'Token expired'}

test-017.scenario: validateJWT returns error for malformed token
then: Returns Promise resolving to {valid: false, error: 'Malformed token'}

test-018.scenario: validateJWT returns error for invalid signature
given: A token signed with different secret
then: Returns Promise resolving to {valid: false, error: 'Invalid signature'}

then: No new access token is generated

given: A refresh token that has revokedAt timestamp set

test-029.scenario: auth.refresh rejects token not in store

then: Returns error with message 'Token not found'
No new access token is generated
